title: AI Caveman
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a prehistoric portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a realistic prehistoric Stone Age portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Reimagine clothing as rugged natural hides and simple woven materials, add primitive tools only where they fit the pose, place the subject in a natural cave or wilderness environment, and use cinematic firelight or daylight with documentary-quality photorealism.
negative_prompt: modern clothing, futuristic elements, cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, sci-fi technology, modern city, unrealistic proportions, noise, pixelation, cropped body, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. stone age hunter, cave firelight...
